phrases.text_local: Quelle est l'atmosphère du quartier de Monte-Carlo ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah-tos-FAIR doo kar-TYAY duh mon-tuh-KAR-loh
phrases.cultural_note: Monte-Carlo is Monaco's glitzy entertainment district — home to the casino, upscale hotels, restaurants, and the opera. Expect designer boutiques and supercars.

responses.local: Monte-Carlo est luxueux, avec des casinos et une vue sur la mer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the beaches in Monte-Carlo
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des plages à Monte-Carlo ?
phrases.cultural_note: Monte-Carlo's beaches are all private (plages privées). The public beach is at Larvotto, just east of the main casino district.

responses.english: No, the beaches in Monte-Carlo are private. The public beach is located at Larvotto, just to the east.
responses.local: Non, il n'y a pas de plages publiques à Monte-Carlo. Les plages privées, comme celle du Monte-Carlo Beach, sont réservées aux clients des hôtels. La plage publique la plus proche est Larvotto, à 10 minutes à pied.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the casino's architectural style
phrases.text_local: Quel est le style architectural du casino ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh steel ar-shee-tek-toh-REL doo kah-ZEE-noh
phrases.cultural_note: The casino complex is a prime example of Belle Époque architecture, designed by Charles Garnier (the same architect as Paris Opéra).

responses.english: It's a Belle Époque building by Charles Garnier.
responses.phonetic: wee, suh-LAH ruh-MON-tah oon pay-ree-OHD ahn-SYEN
responses.local: Promenez-vous au Jardin Exotique ou visitez le casino.

phrases.text_local: Comment aller au casino en transports en commun ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON ah-LAY oh kah-ZEE-noh on trahnz-POR don koh-MON
phrases.cultural_note: Monaco's metro (Line 1) has a Monte-Carlo station. From there, it's a short walk to the casino and harbor.

responses.english: The Monte-Carlo metro station is the closest. It is a five-minute walk away.
responses.phonetic: luh პრო-shan day-PAR eh byan-TOH, ruh-gar-DAY luh pah-NOH
responses.local: Prenez le bus ou marchez, les distances sont courtes.
